name: reply_to_ticket
description: Send a public reply to a customer on an existing ticket. The reply is delivered via the ticket's original channel (email, portal, etc.). You can also add internal notes visible only to agents by setting the note endpoint instead.

parameters.name: ticket_id
parameters.description: The ID of the ticket to reply to.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The reply content in HTML format.
parameters.example: Thank you for reaching out. We have identified the issue with your payment and it has been resolved. Please try again.

parameters.name: cc_emails
parameters.description: Email addresses to CC on the reply.

parameters.name: bcc_emails
parameters.description: Email addresses to BCC on the reply.

body.body: Thank you for reaching out. We have identified the issue with your payment and it has been resolved. Please try again.

body.body_text: Thank you for reaching out. We have identified the issue with your payment and it has been resolved. Please try again.
